title: State
description: Output of concept-state. The concept's local micromodel of data.

type.description: Type using Alloy-style notation: 'one X' (exactly one), 'lone X' (zero or one), 'set X' (unordered collection), 'seq X' (ordered sequence), 'X -> Y' (relation).

description.description: What this state component represents and how actions use it.
